title: United List's Andris Kulbergs asked to form a new Latvian government
summary_full: Following consultations with political parties on Saturday afternoon, Latvian President Edgars Rinkēvičs announced that he was tasking Andris Kulbergs of the opposition United List political force with attempting to form a new government.
